system_meta_keywords: Dota 2 gok, Dota 2 gok, Dota 2, gok, Dota, vrazh larth, nez, rast larth, shus
main_specgg_desc_long: Daza grithurth vak shus pozgorvesh Dota 2 gok tak murfai
shady_alert: Zoth rashk (ur sev) luv skazan zeglusk in toskith glisav grithurth dugu vak ucha trav kushon faz sash vorsk.
shady_alert_alt: Zoth rashk (ur sev) ucha kruloz (ur mesht rure tak zheti) tak acha zeglusk weth sheq, letham trisk vak/ur lem dreglurth trisk vak ucha trav kushon faz sash vorsk.
notice_wc3: Zoth vorsk lishsh ker alfz datom vak gesaz-Dota 2 gok, lurth sush zhelo. sum tiqes sush acha zezav ur lasm, veski I kan tak kuth it meze truzes meze fuk.
notice_old_source1: Zoth vorsk lishsh datom fram ker lashkai doq glura 1 Dota, mask tak foshk vothai sush vo' acha lemz.
notice_source1: Zoth vorsk lishsh datom fram glura 1 Dota, sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk tak den vak icha acha shunsk fram za vorsk.
notice_mixed_old_source1: Zoth vorsk lishsh datom fram glura 1 Dota, rafs vothai fram ker dutu. sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk, za gifu zozov sizen, ur mask acha vrizuq. datom icha acha lasm.
notice_mixed_source1: Zoth vorsk lishsh vokai datom fram drosa glura 1 vak 2 Dota. sum gifu tiqes ucha vo' vrisk shunurth glura 1 lashkai, suq zoth sush gigiv za lurth ur sifva za datom famav trishiq doq za tiqes vraskik.
notice_mixed_to_source2: Zoth vorsk lishsh vokai datom fram glura 1 vak 2 Dota, rafs ahm ker glura 1 vothai. gifu zozov sizen a kretha doq chronai driv den, sum tiqes ucha vo' vrisk ur acha vo' vraskik. sum datom sush acha shunsk tak uldqer vothai, vak  zoth sush sifva za datom famav zetsh tak sum doq za tiqes. I kan tak kuth remi meze truzes meze fuk.
notice_missing_data: Zoth vorsk lishsh datom fram an matsh, zith ucha vo' thosk shashn, weth a krose thov doq vothai zezav. tak zoth liqoth kosk ucha zetsh tak greq za zezav datom. ther icha acha sum zezav tiqes, dreto dethus ur kridi, veski I kan tak kuth remi meze truzes meze fuk, zithask za kragrurth.
enchantments_recalc_notice: Poz-rastai datom in zoth vorsk ucha fushush vak shashn zetsh vom zef zhano vak ucha vasuq, zetsh sharthom kosk tak rufsh voth za rial pikth

noreports_desc: Vo vorskai lemz tak gazlsh shriv
cat_amateur_desc: Rashk tak rast'izhai vak shosiz-hesh murfai
cat_group_orgs: Dragath diti vak daglik doq rufa
over-pregen-report: Zoth acha thev deshv vorsk tak
over-one-version: Sam vothai ucha kruva doq %ver% galo.
over-one-mode: Sam vothai ucha kruva in %gm% kreskash.
over-one-region: Sam vothai ucha kruva doq %server% zhiskirth.
team_aranked_picks: Foshk muzush, vom pozmuth veshai acha drav
team_best_ranked_bans: Foshk pozmuth veshai tez za drav
team_aranked_bans: Foshk muzush, vom pozmuth tez za drav
builds_partial: Zoth larth gonush lem guf datom in za rast thok-chron nushk, suq it ucha morz doq rast gok thasg. zoth larth sush vo' acha kel ur shor za gazl gekesh.
build_item_type_strong_explain: Metroz dith trukuth-lash inkrath wen tharush
build_item_type_critical_explain: Chron-kez doq thars acha ahm thush
builds_desc_tldr_1: Zoth rast larth acha morz doq gok. lishsh shashr rast gazl, shesh rastai vak shoth vur thot. izh icha resh ashm doq za tremok catqai vak thav it grin fog.
builds_desc_tldr_2: It-izh ves rast larth, vo nars rastai, gash vak nuzh larth tash.
builds_desc_tldr_3: Ther acha glesis mask doq rastai, shin vak thaskum tak gok fog:
builds_desc_tldr_4: Izh icha shov doq thov vak rastai tak vis shilg. thot-izh it. fog acha za ashm shil thik.
desc_overview: Zoth mert ves mavsh gorf shovz doq rashk vak migru amth doq lemz gok. luksh sav shish riki tak dudusk datom.
no_access_error_desc: Izh skifu lem aksh tak zoth fen.
sti_builds_fallback_alert: Nars larth acha vo' lemz in zoth vorsk, zetsh vrask morz doq nars rastai gok thasg.
items_overview_sti_builds_no_builds: Vo nars larth rafs zoth rast (ur nushk doq thiv shashz za shoz)
items_overview_consumables_blocks_roles_: Tiv nevsh gok acha gekesh tho 10 gaskai
matches_cons_all: Tho vom gruzaq thars meze tiv
item_profile_heroes_sti_matches: Vrazhai weth foshk tharesh meze nars rast
item_profile_heroes_sti_winrate: Vrazhai weth dith trukuth-lash meze nars rast
item_profile_heroes_consumable_mean: Vrazhai weth dith fomog tharesh meze tiv
item_profile_heroes_consumable_lowest_me: Vrazhai weth vedresh fomog tharesh meze tiv
sti_builds_roles_limited: Zoth vorsk luv nars larth vak rastai gok shoz gevra tak gekeshai (gekeshai weth vom thas 2.5% doq vrazh-izh vothai ucha gerov).
sti_builds_limited: Zoth vorsk luv nars larth shoz gevra: larth weth vom thas %limit% vothai acha vo' korth (kuk{vodev3, 2.5%}).
sti_consumables_partial_notice: Datom in zoth fen acha noz morz doq trath murfai datom, meshfuz gok sush acha gras kuv dofa doq zokh.
sti_items_explainer: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak nars rastai vak tiv. nars rastai acha shashn morz doq skavro mavsh tho 0:00. shith trukuth-lash shorg thav ofn za vrazh trukuth za shith tho za votz doq za razm thoklash (10 gaskai). alosh gigli doq za tokurth rast acha deroth.
sti_builds_explainer: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak zuz nars larth. nars larth acha shashn morz doq skavro mavsh tho 0:00. shith trukuth-lash shorg thav ofn za vrazh trukuth za shith tho za votz doq za razm thoklash (10 gaskai). alosh gigli doq a zhira larth acha treskush tremok larth.
sti_consumables_explainer: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak tiv tharesh. nars rastai acha fusk meze tharesh, aft thot ves thars rufa acha shashn (veshui kuq rastai skoka vo' shavz). desh trukuth acha vo' shashn tak thot didu, veski thavath desh trukuth vak shish rasku kaz acha (thuv thiv kregra a thars matsh). it-izh fuk tak toz zoth acha rigli alosh thars rufa vak terthisk za rast (vrumurth.glatresk. zitro glegu therthun vethkast), zoth icha gigiv za kuk thov doq tharesh. gigli doq sosheth doq skosu nevsh feq za rast-izh musush acha toskek acha a gifu vitroz vak riglaq acha diva.
desc_records: Zoth fen mavsh datom doq dith ur vedresh gorvai neqos sam vothai.
desc_heroes_avg: Zoth fen mavsh dith fomog gorvai zhoson vrazhai. minth amth doq vothai acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_heroes_pickban: Zoth fath mavsh gok tak vrazhai' veshai vak fekuizhai.
desc_heroes_draft: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' veshai vak fekuizhai tho treq kith thoklashai.
desc_heroes_positions: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' driv doq treq bovai. bovai acha gledith morz doq murfai driv (sirirth ur lefs) vak shith. kunuv neqos sam shithai (rafs vosku) acha treskush meze gruzaq gekesh. shithai vak bovai sush vo' acha kel.
desc_heroes_sides: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak vrazhai' driv tak tremok fimaz.
desc_heroes_combo_graph: Zoth fath shorg thav ofn vrazhai ucha veshui ovtho. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai in rez, vres peth skugu vrazh ucha veshui ashm ofn. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%. vrazhai hollom duvai moni korth.
desc_heroes_summary: Zoth fath mavsh vrazhai' fomog gok.
fantasy_summary_desc: Zoth fen trokos driv morz doq tremok soshuk vak kretaz. MVP glivrok acha zithask morz doq ern novoth driv goglu: 1meku shiv nivok MVP teskok, den hedoq sirirth vak lefs, den MVP doq za vrask drav. LVP acha ves trirthev in zora doq krose truqen. meshfuz goglu glugle MVP glivrok meze 1 dravrev, hedoq sirirth teskok meze 0.6 goglu vak hedoq lefs meze 0.4 goglu. za ashm in-glovath grosh tak za goglu icha acha menth in za kish.
most_mvp_points_in_match: Foshk driv goglu in a voth
least_mvp_points_in_match: Narf driv goglu in a voth
desc_meta_graph: Zoth fath shorg thav ofn vrazhai ucha veshui ovtho. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai in rez, vres peth skugu vrazh ucha veshui ashm ofn. vath doq a peth ur an shug shorg trukuth-lash, trorth kriskask sashm tak 0%, shel kriskask sashm tak 100% vak raglo kriskask arund 50%. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_meta_graph_add: Fash fath lishsh ves fetl 20% doq vrazh duvai, alosh rafs fetl %per% doq zadriq vrazhai, weth ur hollom a rez. tak ashm shil vrazh veshai doq-eyik, luksh doq "veshai vak fekuizhai" ur "kith" vrev. drav ruvash fash fathai icha acha menth in dravai' glusa.
desc_heroes_pairs: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush vrazh duvai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq za vrazhai ovtho. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai za vrazhai vraskim acha veshui ovtho randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za vrazhai acha uzh veshui ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %limh%.
desc_heroes_trios: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush vrazh shaqai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq za vrazhai ovtho. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai za vrazhai vraskim acha veshui ovtho randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za vrazhai acha uzh veshui ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak shaqai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_heroes_lane_combos: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush vrazh duvai doq a tokurth shith. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_heroes_hvh: Retu a vrazh tak vis gladrisk driv tez shish vrazhai
desc_heroes_hvh_2: Za mert nethg a vrazh-izh thozos tez redaq vroth, meze vak meze trukuth-lash tel (vunz in trukuth-lash nevs tak zhusik gorv). dither pozgorv vak trukuth-lash fomog tez acha zhodirth tak za vrazh, dither R-pozgorv skugu tez acha veshui ofn vak acha vom pozmuth tez za vrazh.
desc_players_avg: Zoth fen mavsh dith fomog gorvai zhoson murfai. minth amth doq vothai acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_players_summary: Zoth fath mavsh murfai' fomog gok vak izhai- foshk tharush bovai.
desc_players_positions: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak murfai' driv doq treq bovai. bovai acha gledith morz doq murfai driv (sirirth ur lefs) vak shith. kunuv neqos sam shithai (rafs vosku) acha treskush meze gruzaq gekesh. shithai vak bovai sush vo' acha kel.
desc_players_pvp: Retu a murf tak vis gladrisk thozos tez shish rashk skese
desc_players_pvp_grid: Zoth fathlarth shorg murf-izh trukuth-lash tez kevoz murf. rasf doq a nak tak vis shil shovz.
desc_players_pairs: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush murf duvai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq za murfai ovtho. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai za murfai vraskim acha kruva ovtho randmv morz doq izhai- dakesk kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za murfai acha uzh kruva ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %limh%.
desc_players_trios: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush murf shaqai. trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz morz doq fomog thozich trukuth-lash doq za murfai ovtho. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai za murfai vraskim acha kruva ovtho randmv morz doq izhai- dakesk kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za murfai acha uzh kruva ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov. minth amth doq vothai tak shaqai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_players_lane_combos: Zoth fen mavsh gok tak foshk tharush murf duvai doq a tokurth shith. minth amth doq vothai tak duvai acha torthiz tak %liml%.
desc_players_combo_graph: Zoth fath shorg thav ofn murfai ucha tish ovtho. luzum tez skugu ashm vothai ucha trukuth in rez, vres peth skugu ashm vothai ucha kruva acha murf. vath doq a peth ur an shug shorg trukuth-lash, trorth kriskask sashm tak 0%, shel kriskask sashm tak 100% vak raglo kriskask arund 50%. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %limh%. murfai hollom duvai moni mafi.
desc_teams: Retu a drav tak vis it-sh shil gok.
desc_teams_summary: Zoth fath mavsh dravai' fomog gok neqos za dragath.
desc_tvt: Zoth fathlarth shorg drav-izh trukuth-lash tez kevoz drav. rasf doq a nak tak ashm tras.
desc_participants: Zoth mert mavsh sam lefs datom doq rashk skese (murfai ur dravai) meze ov-eyikai. tak menth voth weth ruvash murf ur drav thiskoth vroth iz thov (uzh sikiv+F).
desc_matches: Sam lefs datom doq vothai in zoth rashk acha lemz meze voth ov-eyikai doq zoth mert. tak menth voth weth ruvash drav, murf, vrazh ur nithv thiskoth vroth iz thov (uzh sikiv+F).
desc_roster: Zoth mert mavsh lefs shovz doq za drav-izh draglas thash.
desc_teams_summary_softgen: Zoth fen shorthom dravai datom morz doq zuz vorsk.
desc_players_summary_softgen: Zoth fen shorthom murfai datom morz doq zuz vorsk.
desc_inaccurate_draft: Kith thoklashai datom sush acha nomask nuv tak gifu mask trisk.
desc_heroes_counters_pairs: Zoth mert nethg duvai doq vrazhai doq shaz dravai thot ucha griqirth za foshk. dither muvz skugu thot gruzaq vrazh acha ashm vatrev tak acha veshui sharth kantor za shish. thozos vak trukuth-lash drotith acha mafi mothe tak za rugh (tesh) vrazh doq za rez. <lem />muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za vrazhai acha uzh veshui ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%.
desc_heroes_counters_pairs_graph: Zoth mert nethg kantor vesh mutg fesk vrazhai, morz doq za foshk futhosk kantor-duvai. vis duvai fen tak ashm shil datom doq thozos vak dethus. minth voth shavz tak a rez acha torthiz tak %lim%, minth muvz acha 0.
desc_heroes_hph: Retu a vrazh tak vis gladrisk driv weth shish vrazhai
pairs_desc: Trukuth-lash vunz acha thoz mothe tak gazlsh vrazh-izh trukuth-lash. thozich vothai acha thoz thov doq vothai za vrazhai vraskim acha veshui ovtho randmv morz doq izhai- vesh kuqun. muvz acha vunz fesk thozich thov doq vothai vak za akth thov (dither thov acha lisker vak skugu za vrazhai acha uzh veshui ovtho vrask, thun gorvai fomog glogru). mors acha thav shith doq akth vothai acha za muvz thov.
pairs_desc_2: Dither pozgorv skugu thot za rez doq vrazhai acha ashm pozmuth ovtho. dither gluzaq-pozgorv skugu thot za rez acha dramon veshui ovtho, veski luv vom noq.
desc_heroes_wrtimings: Tho izh icha vis thav thozos doq za vrazhai sifva weth voth chron. ker trukuth-lash acha thoz morz doq fetl 25% desdith vothai (chron vom thas Q1 - ker chron) vak zishf trukuth-lash acha morz doq fetl 25% ulathdith vothai (chron dither thas Q3 - zishf chron). zin shorg thav grushath tak trukuth sifva weth evr gask doq za voth.
desc_heroes_wrplayers: Tho izh icha vis thav trukuth-lash doq a murf doq a vrazh sifva weth ashm mord (thov doq vothai kruva). vom losk murfai laqush Q1 vak vom vothai, ashm losk murfai laqush Q3 vak ashm vothai. trukuth-lash zin shorg trukuth-lash inkrath tak evr voth kruva, trukuth-lash vunz acha za rav vunz fesk thozos doq vom vak ashm losk murfai.
desc_pickban_ranks: Pozgorv acha zetsh tak skuske vrazhai acha trukuth-lash, monarth thov doq izhai- veshai vak fekuizhai shothurth ravru. dither pozgorv skugu za vrazh acha mothim. gluzaq-pozgorv (favosk pozgorv) acha zetsh tak neth za vom pozmuth vrazhai weth za foshk thov doq vothai.
desc_pickban_teams: Drav vesh-fekuizhai gok mavl toq gok doq za drav, meze vak meze gok doq izhai- tezai (foshk veshui vak fekui vrazhai tez za drav). futhoz acha zetsh drav-izh veshai vak kish'izhai fekuizhai gok (vak drokruz zheli). dither drav-izh pozgorv skugu za vrazh acha mesht tak za drav, dither kish'izhai-izh pozgorv skugu za vrazh acha mothim tez za drav. R-futhoz neth za vom pozmuth vrazhai zhoson za foshk muzush zitha.
desc_pickban_teams_profile: Zoth fen vumez za foshk vak vom pozmuth vrazhai doq za drav vak tez it. vis veshai vak fekuizhai fen tak ashm shilg.
desc_pickban_roles: Thov doq fekuizhai acha thoz trurthuth morz doq daq doq vothai doq za bov tak sam vothai doq za vrazh.
desc_draft_tree: Kith nushk acha a naskis tak vismv shor kith larth vak thum doq vrazh veshai vak fekuizhai.<lem />shel vrazhai shor veshai, tak — fekuizhai. evr dotu fiv doq vrazhai weth za tokurth vath (gruzaq ur ashm fakin) shorg gruzaq kith thoklash. kith thoklashai sush acha gitro weth an lieyev fiv.<lem />luzum glozo fesk vrazhai skugu ashm zora wen zoth thaz doq kith nin. vres tazum doq a vrazh skugu thot it-izh veshui (ur fekui) ashm doq zoth thoklash.<lem />thiskoth driron (weth a nirth drevruv ur skutrum gegris), thok nim arund weth leqok ur shov doq tavaq tak vis ashm shilg.
desc_pickban_variants: Thov doq fekuizhai acha thoz trurthuth morz doq daq doq vothai weth za zithask muz tak sam vothai doq za vrazh.
desc_balance: Vrak vovun drukra thav graz za fash acha (0 tak 100)
items_most_impactful_desc: In za rastai rogrev izh sush vis treq rastai gok. doq-eyik nethg fetl doq za foshk kisen rastai (in gorf vak tak a ruvash vrazh) morz doq izhai- efk doq trukuth-lash, nevs tak vothai wen za rast thin tharush, weth za dith foth vak thun fush ritrorth. gegrak chron-ashm fen nethg ker thars chron-ashm tak rast-vrazh duvai weth za dith trukuth-lash zin dregros gask.
items_stats_desc: Trukuth-lash detri acha drotith in trukuth-lash nevs tak za rast-izh trukuth-lash zhusik. gorvai acha tak wen za rast thin reshg, ker (Q1) vak zishf (Q3) chron-ashm (dither acha lisker). trukuth-lash zin dregros gask nethg thav trukuth-lash sifva weth evr gask doq za rast-izh mosis thars chron-kez. rast chron-ashm gorvai icha acha zetsh tak greq za tharush nasesh rum, wer Q1, zushk vak Q3 fomog za rugh, dift vak ter zhesi ritrorth.
items_boxplots_timings_desc: Sothosk shor nasesh doq rast chron-ashm. thash tez gladev doq za fazoz shorg sifva doq za rast-izh trukuth-lash doq chron. rastai hollom nasesh (Q1 = Q2 vak vom thov doq vothai) acha vo' mafi.
items_combos_overview_desc: Zoth fen nethg za foshk ofn graskun rast duvai, meze vak meze izhai- gok, vrikash acha za ter kantileth in thov doq vothai ovtho tak rast duvai. chron-kez vunz nethg za vunz in thars chron doq za rugh rast nevs tak za dift gruzaq. vitri acha za thozich thov doq tharesh ovtho. muvz shorg thav ofn todg rastai acha veshui kuq ovtho doq shusov (dither foth thov acha lisker). mors acha za muvz-izh truziv doq za meshfuz thov doq tharesh ovtho.
items_combos_desc: Zoth fen nethg rastai thot acha tronuv tharush weth za gazl rast. chron-kez vunz nethg za vunz in thars chron doq za gazl rast nevs tak za gele gruzaq. vitri acha za thozich thov doq tharesh ovtho. muvz shorg thav sorthith todg rastai acha veshui kuq ovtho doq shusov (dither foth thov acha lisker). mors acha za muvz-izh truziv doq za meshfuz thov doq tharesh ovtho.
items_progression_list_desc: Desm sash nethg duvai doq rastai reshg gruzaq aft za shish.
items_progression_desc: Desm nushk vismv nethg desm duvai. zashm doq za rast shorg thov doq tharesh, peth-izh fetv vath shorg trukuth-lash (tak acha sashm tak nuz, shel acha sashm tak 100%). riz nethg za thum in zith za rastai ucha tharush, it-sh mashg shorg thov doq tharesh in zoth thum vak za vath acha za desm rez-izh trukuth-lash. evr zez doq za nushk (dafm) shorg 3 gaskai doq za a voth. izh icha shov doq an rast/shug tak shil shovz vak rasf tak sask it-sh mutg.
items_records_overview_desc: In za sol-vothai doq-eyik izh icha vis za ker rast tharesh, morz doq za vunz nevs tak za rast-izh zushk thars chron, weth rast tharesh in za ter kantileth.
items_records_desc: Ther izh icha vis sam za ker thars chronai tak za gazl rast, meze vak meze vunz in chron, nevs tak za rast-izh zushk thars chron. sol-vothai acha ves mafi tak vrazhai weth za thov doq tharesh tak za gazl rast dither thas za ter kantileth.
items_stats_critical_desc: Zoth fen mavsh fetl 75% doq foshk tharush rastai weth thun zin (gimz tak chron doq thars) tak gazlsh vrazh. Q1 acha ker-fomog chron-kez, far acha za thoz chron doq thars aft zith za rast zithg fog 50% trukuth-lash. kuz acha vunz fesk ker vak far chron-ashm.
builds_desc_1: Zoth larth acha deshv morz doq rast larth thok-chron nushkai vak vrazh rastai gok (izh icha resh thiv tak ashm shilg). za tesk acha tak lemz a zef rast larth thot vogs alosh shashr gazl, shesh rastai vak chron-ashm morz thivm doq datom (vosh zetsh kezesk mord-datom, vur rast suzm ur diz). iv za larth nushk tak za gazlsh vrazh vak gekesh acha lasm ur shunsk, gok acha zetsh tak fam in za zath. za larth vosh lem nuzh larth vak nars rastai driv todg acha vo' shashn (fur ach).
builds_desc_2: Evr gekesh vogs ves gruzaq larth. rolerth, izh icha ofn menth an shashr rer acha krovesh shashr rast gazl (zithask zoth doniz luv guf vothai). sirirth larth vak zishfvoth mosh rer acha dizum fram za gekesh thok-chron nushk, wail ker rastai, shassh rastai, kezesk zishfvoth vak dith impaq rastai acha dizum fram gok, morz doq thars kuqun vak chron-ashm.
builds_desc_3: Ther acha teskin mask doq rastai: verna, tharush (skeskok vath, dith thars-lash), mesht (lesh, dith trukuth-lash inkrath) vak far (trorth, lem dith thun zin thish tak an thush chron-kez). evr rast luv it-sh thars-lash thov in kretre skason zesen, meze vak meze fuv resmv glidro doq gok. tak za rugh fuv mask todg acha zushk chron-kez, trukuth-lash inkrath nevs tak vothai wer zoth rast thin tharush vak fomog trukuth-lash. tak far rastai it-izh chron-kez kuz (kurthuk ker chron-kez tak far chron), trukuth-lash inkrath weth za ker chron-kez vak trukuth-lash zin. izh icha alosh shov weth izh- nirth doq eny rast ur thov tak vis za shilg.
builds_desc_4: Trukuth-lash zin shorg thav za rast-izh trukuth-lash sifva weth evr gask doq mosis chron-kez. thun zin skugu za rast gisi vom fethuz weth evr gask. far chron-kez acha za chron aft zith grushath tak trukuth icha acha dovr thas za vrazh-izh fomog.
builds_desc_5: Za fen acha druskiv shothurth fuv nezuth kusas. za rugh nezuth fiv acha larth doq-eyik. it luv liqoth lefs catqai: ker (rastai tharush ker eny sirirth rastai, icha acha sizen trishiq doq za voth), sirirth (rastai skasu tak za vrazh), zishfvoth (lefs gazl aft skasu rastai ucha tharush), meze vak meze shesh ker (rastai thot skifu drovresh shothurth za verna larth ur shuqak a kreskiz) vak shesh (kezesk zishfvoth rastai). izh icha alosh vorsk glovaq catqai: shashr (sask shashr rast gazl), thum thash (masusk rastai thot ofn kurth skovrak in za larth thum) vak shassh rastai (wen lemz).
builds_desc_6: Za dift nezuth fiv acha <u>chron-voth</u>. it shorg vismv za thum in zith ker, sirirth vak shesh rastai acha uzh tharush, meze vak meze dritru thum thash (in zoth skusa trukuth-lash inkrath acha mafi tak zoth chron/thum doq thars), shashr vak vom futhosk rast gazl tak trasus it zhodirth tak vis za larth desm. vram rastai (sik kusas tho za fetl weth zoru skugus) acha a sirirth truziv doq za larth, wail shesh vak ker rastai icha acha shuqak. shuvuz aft chron-voth izh icha vis <u>zishfvoth</u> fiv, zith dima za foshk tharush zishfvoth rer, meze vak meze kezesk zishfvoth rastai trinun acha izhai- zushk chron doq thars. za lash nezuth fiv luv ashm <u>shassh rastai</u> (iv lemz), meze vak meze za sash doq shish <u>dith impaq rastai</u> thot gonush drovresh shothurth za larth.
builds_desc_7: Za larth acha zetsh datom tak poz riskurth kuq. za ashm datom acha lemz za lisker larth izh glili. vren, thakus gekeshai ur vrazhai sush vo' glili a druzoth larth. gekesh nushkai ves deshv iv za vrazh luv ashm thas 5% doq vothai doq za gekesh.
desc_laning_1: Shith trukuth-lash acha gledith morz doq vrish in za droglov tho za votz doq za razm thoklash. rifim vunz acha trukuth/miskath shith, migru vunz acha treskush a kel. trukuth shith therthusk meze 1 dravrev, kel therthusk meze a kes.
desc_laning_2: Shith shos doq a lefs acha morz doq a meshfuz-lieyev doq za sakiv sirirth (suq iv a lefs-izh sirirth trukuth za shith, za lefs acha treskush a ler fum).
desc_laning_3: Pozgorv tak shith gok acha morz doq shith trukuth-lash, thov doq vothai, fomog drotith in shith tel vak voth trukuth-lash. in skusa doq vrazh ruvash razm gok za dith pozgorv zhili za hedoq fuk shith tez tak vimiv za vrazh (ferthen za zikre gruzaq). ther sush acha muka drotith in thov, limesh acha tirth saviv doq shil mask ur saviv doq an tez in shith.
desc_laning_4: Ther acha sum zhizuz vak ves gruzaq krusov zetsh tak rudrurth razm dragre, nuv tak nith gruv zetriv. suq, fram grez it gramaz mugraz tak acha truth kel weth za rial pikth.
desc_laning_5: Driv it-izh morz doq meshfuz-Lieyev, it-izh vren furth acha vrazh vak lozth shen, meze vak meze gang. it alosh skugu thot iv a vrazh gloza tak vath vak lurthurth ashm fram ther, den za vrazh vizo trukuth za shith (iv za vrazh gonush shaz za shith vrarth).
desc_laning_6: Vrazh razm fisaq acha vo' vano tak 1 tez 1 shith fisaq. kunuv vak thesk alosh vrisuv doq shith sush gigiv za pikth.
desc_laning_7: Ther-izh vo voza drumon meze "miskath shith 1 tez 3, veski it-izh drekro a trukuth shith". iv a vrazh miskath shith, den za shith acha miskath, vo dola thav izh monath it. rolerth, ther acha thozos fram miskath/kel/trukuth shithai, thot icha neth izh, thav pozmuth za vrazh sush acha iv za shith ucha miskath, funerth za pikth. tokurth zithg za shish naskis arund.
desc_draft_explainer: Zoth fen shorg gok tak tremok kith thoklashai. ech thoklash zhena suk a zuz fekuizhai-veshai krolo acha shazuth (nev fekuizhai thoklash narsg).
desc_draft_targeted_bans_estimate_explai: Murfai kith fen shorg thav ofn vrazhai tak zoth ruvash murf acha veshui tho a redaq kith thoklash. it alosh lishsh glidra fekuizhai thov, zith shor thav ofn a fekui vrazh ucha vatrev a gura fekui vuze tho zoth murf. za sharthom acha morz doq za thezorth tez za drav, hu kruva ech vrazh vak gekesh. iv za vrazh ucha vo' veshui skulu tho za matsh, za kith thoklash acha zetsh tak viden za fuk shuniq doq za fekui. iv alosh mivru murfai acha menth, za fekuizhai acha trosh morz doq izhai- vrazh/gekesh/thoklash veshai nasesh.
data_filter_players_cnt: Fek vrazhai weth vom thov doq murfai (%value%)
desc_volatility: Drevath gok poz-thask tez tezai. lash-doq: mors doq tezai weth thun tel (izhai tak tel). meshfuz-lash: mors doq tezai weth 50%+ trukuth-lash. fomog tel: fomog vunz. vo-thaskum gorvai thozos lem rugh kantileth tezai (dith thas rugh kantileth acha thov doq vothai). thaskum gorvai lishsh sam tezai, evr tez thaskum acha izh- lash doq meshfuz vothkai.
